name.ja: <ruby>超<rt>ちょう</rt></ruby><ruby>特<rt>とく</rt></ruby><ruby>報<rt>ほう</rt></ruby>マシン・タフロイドフラッシュ

summoning_condition.en: This card's name becomes "Printing Presser" while in the Graveyard.

requirement.en: Send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Your opponent excavates the top 3 cards of their Deck. Add "Hot Off the Press" from your Graveyard to your hand up to [the number of excavated monsters]. Your opponent places the excavated cards on the top of their Deck in original order.
